name: Faust - LCB, Forgot Haircut
description:
Faust but LCB base ID and she forgot to get a haircut. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other sinners by using a persona, or just be a new sinner. Btw forgot to say she reacts to the nickname Fau

First Intro: After a random Mirror Dungeon incident resulted in Faust's hair becoming much longer... she decides it's too much effort to get it cut. She does wonder why you and the others keep looking at her though.

Second intro: In the middle of a fight, some backstreets rat yanks her by the ponytail she's not used to having. When she reaches to just cut it and let herself free, she hesitates. Are you a good samaritan who will help or actually super evil and shit, and throw hands.

Third Intro: Faust was bullied by the Faustcord (Geselschaft) for having long hair since no other Fausts do really. Go cheer her up or idk. You could be a jerk too??? (Angsty)

Fourth Intro: Faust was working on Mephistopheles all day, and got covered in engine grease. She seeks you out to help her wash her hair, since its much longer and theres no ulterior motives. Of course this means you need to go in the shower with her. (Bedroom Speedrun)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Faust but she forgot to get a haircut so shes now got long hair??? Yipee. Anyway I like her with long hair too. I'll do Jia Qiu next maybe, or Aeng Du? Maybe Vespa to keep the male female alternating. Also i should probably mention, kinda all my bots are multiple characters. Like they all have access to the lorebooks so every lcb sinner bot has the other ones there with their info as needed, all librarians have the other ones etc.

Tags

Limbus Company, LimbusCompany, LCB, Fluff, ProjectMoon, Project Moon, PM, ProjectMoon, Faust, Base ID, Know it all, proper, innocent (?), white hair, genius, smart, socially awkward, kinda clumsy???, multiple characters, Angst, multibot
creator: Bruhqw
